jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Medanta
jsonLd.description:
Medanta has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Medanta:
Medanta is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medanta!
